creator: alex@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thus spake Jeremy Karlson (karlj000@unbc.ca):

> In any case, I made the diff as suggested, and I've attached it here.
> I hope that's okay.  (I'm new here, please don't beat me.)

This is very ok.

This makes it a lot easier. 

Thanks, I've committed it.

Alex
